name: WordGrid Bot
description: Viral Telegram Word Grid Puzzle Game Bot — themed grids, leaderboards, combo scoring, 10k+ group ready.

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram numeric user ID (get from @userinfobot)

UPDATES_CHANNEL.description: Telegram channel link for bot updates

BOT_INVITE_LINK.description: Bot invite link with startgroup param

USE_PREMIUM_EMOJI.description: Set true to use Telegram premium emoji. Requires bot to have premium emoji access.

WORDS_PER_ROUND.description: Number of hidden words per round

COOLDOWN_SECONDS.description: Cooldown between rounds in a group

POINTS_PER_LETTER.description: Base points per letter of found word

FIRST_FINDER_BONUS.description: Bonus points for finding the very first word in a round

BROADCAST_DELAY.description: Seconds to wait between broadcast messages (avoid Telegram flood)
